features.name: identical continuous assignments with different downstream usage
features.description: Code should include two separate continuous assignments with identical RHS expressions where one feeds a chain of operations but the other does not

features.name: wire assignment chain with offset computation
features.description: Code should include a chain of continuous assignments where each wire adds an offset to the previous wire's value
features.snippet:
wire [31:0] dly1 = dly0 + 32'h1;
wire [31:0] dly2 = dly1 + 32'h1;

features.name: redundant identical wire computations
features.description: Code should include multiple continuous assignments computing the same expression from the same operand that feed different circuit paths
